epithet: of the Gold Dragonborn, born to breath and blade
constellation_epithet: the seasoned blade, in every fight
distinction_subtitle: whose rolls wander least of all the company
distinction_detail: 5.4 standard deviation · the steadiest die at the table

archetype_badge.inscription: Ten days of rations and a full waterskin — the noble dragonborn ensures no one marches hungry, even when the road offers nothing.

epithet: of the Rock Gnomes, reader of the threefold weave
constellation_epithet: the heaviest toll, and every bit earned
distinction_subtitle: who once took six souls inside a single night
distinction_detail: 6 kills in one session · no greater single-day harvest told

archetype_badge.inscription: Travels lighter than any gnome has a right to — staff, two daggers, and a rain catcher folded tight, the whole kit barely whispering when she moves.

epithet: of the Dhakaani, bound by pact to a shadow unseen
constellation_epithet: much weight from a quiet hand
distinction_subtitle: who alone has felled the heaviest thing the company has met
distinction_detail: 450 XP · the single largest kill any hand has claimed

archetype_badge.inscription: Fifteen flasks of oil and a lamp that hasn't gone dark yet — a goblin who walked out of Dhakaan carrying enough light to argue with the night.

epithet: of the Wulven, who answers the question with a crossbow and the doubt with the rail
reliquary_header: Sent over the rail to the sea
distinction_subtitle: No other hand turns up the twenty so often.
distinction_detail: 10 crit successes · no hand in the company turns the twenty so often

archetype_badge.inscription: The hunting trap alone tips twenty-five pounds; above it ride scale mail and a heavy crossbow, and the wulven still finds room for caltrops, rope, and a block-and-tackle besides.

epithet: of the Tabaxi, who lets the bowstring do all her speaking
constellation_epithet: newest of the pack, already counting kills
distinction_subtitle: who turned three crit successes inside one session's span
distinction_detail: 3 crit successes in a single session · her brightest night by far

archetype_badge.inscription: One carved sprig of mistletoe, ribbon-tied and kept close — the whole of the primal green, if you know how to ask, flows through that small stem.
